profits_regime.basis: Régimen Sobre las Utilidades de Actividades Lucrativas: flat 25% on net taxable income (Ley de Actualización Tributaria, Decreto 10-2012).
profits_regime.iso_solidarity_note: Companies in the profits regime are also subject to the ISO solidarity tax (Impuesto de Solidaridad): approximately 1% minimum tax on the greater of net assets or gross revenue, creditable against CIT.

simplified_optional_regime.basis: Régimen Opcional Simplificado Sobre Ingresos de Actividades Lucrativas: levied on GROSS REVENUE, not net profit — 5% on monthly gross revenue up to GTQ 30,000 and 7% on the excess.
simplified_optional_regime.note: Not implemented in the calculator: this regime uses a different tax base (monthly gross revenue) than the net-profit input (winst), so bereken_cit_guatemala raises ValueError for regime='simplified'.

vat.note: IVA (Impuesto al Valor Agregado) at a standard 12% rate.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Regime election, ISO solidarity credit mechanics, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official SAT guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
